notes:
- Auto-update: matata now silently downloads new installers in the background
- Toast on completion: 'matata X.Y.Z downloaded -- installs automatically on quit'
- Tray menu adds 'Install update X.Y.Z now' while an update is staged
- WM_DESTROY runs the staged installer with /VERYSILENT /CLOSEAPPLICATIONS /RESTARTAPPLICATIONS
- Falls back to the legacy browser-download MessageBox if the silent fetch fails
